1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings & Vector Search"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]

1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"LLM Configuration (Sleep Summarization)"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep cycle uses an LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory. Can run locally or via an external API."}]

34:["$","p",null,{"children":["| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR"}]," | ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data | Directory for database, logs, models, and stats |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOME"}]," | ~/.hermes/mnemosyne | Override home directory for all Mnemosyne data |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHARED_DB_PATH"}]," | data/shared/mnemosyne.db | SQLite path for shared surface memory DB |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BLOB_DIR"}]," |  | Directory for blob storage (content sanitizer output) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE"}]," | 1 | Auto-migrate DB schema on startup (set to 0 to disable) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}]," | 10000 | smart tiered compression instead of truncation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]," | 300 | Max character length for Tier 3 summaries |\n|
